meta.title: King's Dead
meta.notes: Joey Bada$$ (벌스1, 벌스2)와 XXXTENTACION (벌스3) 두 파트로 구성. Joey는 성공/부/자부심 중심 Boom Bap 스타일. XXX는 트랩+과격한 플렉스. 중간에 Joey가 랩 멈추는 애드립 구간 있음. 스페인어 라인 포함.

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Look I ain't gotta force it
lyrics.translation_notes: ain't gotta = don't have to. 자연스럽게 된다는 자신감

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: This that youngest Under 30 on the Forbes list
lyrics.translation_notes: Forbes 30 Under 30 리스트 레퍼런스. 젊은 성공 자랑

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Yeah I be cashin' out
lyrics.translation_notes: cashin' out = 큰돈을 쓰다/현금화하다. AAVE be+ing = 습관적 행동

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: I moved my mama from the hood Into a fortress
lyrics.translation_notes: moved mama from the hood = 성공의 척도. fortress = 고급 저택 비유

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: I said I made a few Million in some weeks bitch
lyrics.translation_notes: flex. a few million = 수백만 달러

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Hey told the world about it ain't no secret

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: You niggas worried 'bout the crown
lyrics.translation_notes: crown = 랩 최고 자리. 경쟁자들을 비웃음

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Fuck it you can tell Them clowns they can keep it
lyrics.translation_notes: clowns = 우스운 경쟁자들. keep it = 그냥 가져가라

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: At 17 I made six figures
lyrics.translation_notes: six figures = 100,000달러 이상. 십만 단위 수입

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Immature young rich nigga
lyrics.translation_notes: 자기 자신을 묘사. 젊고 부유하지만 아직 철없다는 자인

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: By 21 I made a mil' twice
lyrics.translation_notes: mil' = million. 성장 서사

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Your dreams my real life
lyrics.translation_notes: flex 라인. 짧고 강렬

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: I'm up early you still asleep
lyrics.translation_notes: 성실함과 게으름의 대비

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: I've been a wolf and I kill the sheep
lyrics.translation_notes: wolf/sheep = 포식자/피식자 은유. 경쟁에서 우위

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Gotta pray on the prey for my enemies
lyrics.translation_notes: pray/prey 동음이의어 워드플레이

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Cause they wanna feed off my energy
lyrics.translation_notes: feed off = 기생하다. 에너지 드레인

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Lyrically no one ahead of me
lyrics.translation_notes: lyrically = 가사/랩 실력 기준으로

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: I could die today still leave a legacy
lyrics.translation_notes: legacy = 유산/업적. 자신의 영향력에 대한 자부심

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: That you can't ever be

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Put that on everything this is my destiny
lyrics.translation_notes: put that on everything = 맹세하다. 강한 확신

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: It was all meant to be
lyrics.translation_notes: meant to be = 운명. 필연적 성공

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Fuck is you tellin' me?
lyrics.translation_notes: AAVE. 무시하는 반문

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: You ain't 'bout nothin'
lyrics.translation_notes: ain't 'bout nothin' = AAVE. 가치 없다는 디스

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: With my niggas we flexin' and stuntin'
lyrics.translation_notes: flexin' = 과시. stuntin' = 멋진 척. AAVE

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: 'Cause we had to work harder was hustlin'
lyrics.translation_notes: hustlin' = 열심히 일하다/돈 벌다

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Play your card 'cause We know that you bluffin'
lyrics.translation_notes: play your card = 패를 내다. bluffin' = 허세/블러핑

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: I got two cars nigga two cribs
lyrics.translation_notes: cribs = 집. 물질적 성공 과시

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Big body and a little Benz
lyrics.translation_notes: big body = 대형 세단 (Cadillac 등). little Benz = 소형 벤츠

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Triplex on my own land
lyrics.translation_notes: triplex = 3층 또는 3세대 건물. 부동산 소유 과시

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: And I paid bills before a grown man
lyrics.translation_notes: 어릴 때부터 돈 벌어 가족 부양했다는 자부심

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: That's on my mama stackin' plenty commas
lyrics.translation_notes: on my mama = 엄마 걸고 맹세. commas = 자릿수 콤마 = 큰돈

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Got good karma like the Dalai Lama
lyrics.translation_notes: karma/Lama 라임. 영적 자부심

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: I'm tailor made for this buy designer
lyrics.translation_notes: tailor made = 맞춤 제작된. designer = 명품 브랜드

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Bitch I'm the nigga just to remind you yeah

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: To remind you to remind you
lyrics.translation_notes: 반복 강조

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Black Power
lyrics.translation_notes: 흑인 자긍심 선언. 정치적 메시지

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Just to remind you Yah murder gang uh
lyrics.translation_notes: XXX 벌스 시작 전 연결 구간

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Ayy ayy Joey ayy Joey I'm just I'm just gon' stop rapping
lyrics.translation_notes: Joey가 XXX에게 마이크 넘기며 농담하는 애드립

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: I'm just gon' stop rapping right now On this song

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: Not I mean not in not in In general but just on this song

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: 'cause You slumped out? I ain't yeah
lyrics.translation_notes: slumped out = 완전히 눌렸다. 농담

lyrics.speaker: Joey
lyrics.text: I ain't Tryna I ain't Tryna destroy these niggas Sike
lyrics.translation_notes: Sike = 속였지! 농담의 반전

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: Ayy grind on my dick like a Ripstik uh
lyrics.translation_notes: Ripstik = 두 바퀴 스케이트보드. 성적 비유. 완곡 처리

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: My body count is like 60 uh
lyrics.translation_notes: body count = 성관계 상대 수. 과장된 플렉스

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: Your bitch on me she need CPR
lyrics.translation_notes: CPR = 심폐소생술. 넋을 잃었다는 과장 표현

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: I fucked that bitch right on DVR
lyrics.translation_notes: DVR = 디지털 녹화기. 완곡 처리

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: I slapped that meat on her cheeky yes
lyrics.translation_notes: 노골적 성적 표현. 번역 생략

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: I sucked her toes yes I'm freaky yes
lyrics.translation_notes: freaky = 성적으로 파격적인

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: Caught a grand theft just like GTA
lyrics.translation_notes: Grand Theft Auto 게임 레퍼런스

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: If he talk shit watch me beat him ayy
lyrics.translation_notes: beat = 때리다. 폭력 위협

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: Hop on that beat and I beat the A
lyrics.translation_notes: beat the A = Atlanta(에이티) 를 제압. A = Atlanta

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: Work work work shout out to RiRi ayy
lyrics.translation_notes: RiRi = Rihanna. Work 노래 레퍼런스

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: Keep a blade on me like Sasuke uh
lyrics.translation_notes: Sasuke = 나루토 캐릭터. 닌자 검 레퍼런스

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: Shout out my nigga ImDontai uh
lyrics.translation_notes: ImDontai = 유명 유튜버/XXX 친구

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: Build to the pussy like Fortnite uh
lyrics.translation_notes: Fortnite 건설 시스템 레퍼런스. 완곡 처리

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: My dick is stuck in your whore like Oww
lyrics.translation_notes: 노골적 성적 표현. 번역 생략

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: ¡cabron ¿que tu dijiste?
lyrics.translation_notes: 스페인어. cabron = 욕설. que tu dijiste = 뭐라고 했어?

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: Bae it's just a lyric bae ¿que tu dijiste?
lyrics.translation_notes: XXX가 여자친구에게 변명하는 메타 유머

lyrics.speaker: XXX
lyrics.text: I'm sorry
lyrics.translation_notes: 장난식 사과. 곡 분위기 전환

lyrics.text: Look I ain't gotta force it

cashin' out.context: 성공 과시. 돈을 자유롭게 쓰는 행위

the hood.context: 저소득층 거주 지역. 성공 전 출신지

bluffin'.context: 카드게임 비유. 없는 척하거나 있는 척

big body.context: Cadillac 등 대형 미국 세단 지칭

commas.context: 숫자의 콤마. 백만 달러 이상을 의미

tailor made.context: 딱 맞게 만들어진. 이 일을 위해 태어났다

sike.context: psych. 방금 한 말 취소. 반전 유머

RiRi.context: 가수 Rihanna 별명. Work 노래 레퍼런스
